description:
Currently have both glow.nvim (terminal preview) and markdown-preview.nvim (browser preview). After adding render-markdown.nvim, evaluate whether one or both external preview tools can be dropped.

Depends on: render-markdown.nvim being added first.

Affected files:
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/utility/markdown-preview.nix`
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/utility/glow.nix`
title: Consolidate markdown preview plugins
